programme.title: To Chiara
programme.desc: A Calabrian teenage girl learns some difficult truths about her close-knit family after her father suddenly abandons them. 2021. Italy. Director: Jonas Carpignano. Starring: Swamy Rotolo.

programme.title: Never Look Away
programme.desc: An intimate portrait of trailblazing Kiwi female photojournalist Margaret Moth, who received catastrophic injuries in the crosshairs of battle. 2024. NZ. Director: Lucy Lawless.

programme.title: Women Do Cry
programme.desc: A promising young musician, learns that she is contracted HIV. 2021. Bulgaria, France. Director: Mina Mileva, Vesela Kazakova. Starring: Maria Bakalova, Raltisa Stoyanova.

programme.title: Brassic
programme.desc: 7/4. Curtis revives his DJ persona for a dying man, can the gang find his right hand man in time for the gig. 2025. United Kingdom. Director: Leon Lopez. Starring: Neil Ashton, Tomas Azocar-Nevin S7 E4.

programme.title: Brassic
programme.desc: 7/5. Davey and the gang are up to some Halloween high jinks, stealing the body of his enemy before the funeral. 2025. United Kingdom. Director: Leon Lopez. Starring: Neil Ashton, Darren Cahill S7 E5.

programme.title: 8 Women
programme.desc: In an isolated mansion, the patriarch is found murdered, and the killer can only be one of the eight women closest to him. 2002. France. Director: Francois Ozon. Starring: Isabelle Huppert.

programme.title: Fuhrer And Seducer
programme.desc: While Hitler leads the murderous regime, Joseph Goebbels keeps the propaganda machine oiled. 2024. Germany. Director: Joachim Lang. Starring: Robert Stadlober, Fritz Karl.

programme.title: Families Like Ours
programme.desc: 1/1. Rising sea levels force Laura to decide between her divorced parents and love. 2024. Director: Thomas Vinterberg. Starring: Amaryllis April Maltha August, Albert Rudbeck Lindhardt S1 E1.

programme.title: Families Like Ours
programme.desc: 1/2. Each passing day brings Laura and Elias closer together. 2024. Director: Thomas Vinterberg. Starring: Amaryllis April Maltha August, Albert Rudbeck Lindhardt S1 E2.

programme.title: Families Like Ours
programme.desc: 1/3. As Denmark sinks, angry workers storm the estate looking to get paid. 2024. Denmark. Director: Thomas Vinterberg. Starring: Amaryllis April Maltha August, Albert Rudbeck Lindhardt S1 E3.

programme.title: Families Like Ours
programme.desc: 1/4. Laura says her goodbyes to Fanny and begins a quest of her own. 2024. Denmark. Director: Thomas Vinterberg. Starring: Imad Abul-Foul, Amaryllis April Maltha August S1 E4.

programme.title: ASOG

programme.desc: One of the largest manhunts in modern human history kicks off as two brotherscape 1953 communist Czechoslovakia. 2023. Czech Republic. Director: Tomas Masin. Starring: Oskar Hes, Jan Nedbal.

programme.desc: 1/1. An epidemic of insomnia spreads across Stockholm, and difficult choices must be made. 2025. United States, Iceland. Director: Henrik Georgsson. Starring: Jonas Karlsson, Aliette Opheim S1 E1.

programme.title: Welcome To The Darkness
programme.desc: In 2003, British band The Darkness took the world by storm, then at the height of their fame, they split up. 20 years on, they tell their story. 2023. UK. Director: Simon Emmett.

programme.title: Families Like Ours
programme.desc: 1/5. Jacob risks his family's wellbeing when he asks French police to help find Laura. 2024. Denmark. Director: Thomas Vinterberg. Starring: Amaryllis April Maltha August, Yoann Blanc S1 E5.

programme.title: Families Like Ours
programme.desc: 1/6. Comforted by her reunion with Fanny, Laura still fears that she will never see Elias again. 2024. Denmark. Director: Thomas Vinterberg. Starring: Tourialay Akbari, Marcela Andrei S1 E6.

programme.title: Families Like Ours
programme.desc: 1/7. Laura builds a new life in Bucharest, though her family and friends are sorely missed. 2024. Denmark. Director: Thomas Vinterberg. Starring: Tourialay Akbari, Marianna Arzumanova S1 E7.
